qa_pairs.question: Is Ansys Rocky included with the SHARCNET license?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, the SHARCNET license includes Ansys Rocky.

qa_pairs.question: Who can use the SHARCNET Ansys license?
qa_pairs.answer: The SHARCNET Ansys license is available free of charge for all Alliance researchers to use.

qa_pairs.question: Does Ansys Rocky support GPU-accelerated computing?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Ansys Rocky supports GPU-accelerated computing, however, this functionality has not yet been tested or documented.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find information about running AnsysEDT in graphical mode?
qa_pairs.answer: Information on running AnsysEDT in graphical mode is available on a separate wiki page at https://docs.alliancecan.ca/wiki/AnsysEDT.
